text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: Medicare Part D Plan Characteristics (2007-2014) │ October 2021 │ V 1.4 36 

EXCLUDED_TIER_GAP 

LABEL: Excluded Drugs Covered on this Tier in the Gap Phase 

DESCRIPTION: For Enhanced Alternative plans that cover excluded drugs as a supplemental benefit, this variable 
Indicates whether the Part D plan provides coverage on this tier during the coverage gap phase. 

SHORT NAME: — 

LONG NAME: EXCLUDED_TIER_GAP 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

SOURCE: CMS (HPMS
